warnings: Ignored the instruction-only publication heading '请列举5篇左右代表性论文或著作。(Please list 5 representative publications)' as it did not list concrete items.
The award raw text contains both Chinese and English descriptions; the English description was used for the name and granting organization, but the year was taken from the Chinese text.
The professor's title is listed as '讲师' and 'Lecture' (likely a translation error for 'Lecturer'). The Chinese value '讲师' is used.
The employment experience lacks a specific job title; only the organization is recorded.
